tasks.label: ICM: Setup / preflight
tasks.detail: Check Ollama + the Rust toolchain. (This is the engine/template.)

tasks.label: ICM: MCP protocol test (skeleton)
tasks.detail: Drive the MCP server against the bundled skeleton ICM — no model needed.

tasks.label: ICM: New ICM from skeleton
tasks.command: cp -r icms/skeleton ${input:icmName} && echo 'Created ${input:icmName} — edit its icm.config.json + manifest.json + kb/'
tasks.detail: Copy the skeleton to start a new domain ICM.

tasks.label: ICM: Run MCP server for an ICM
tasks.detail: Start the generic MCP server pointed at an ICM directory.
